message: LSLC is raising money to help Puerto Rico recover from the devastation of Hurricane Maria. Read More!

Living Savior's Third Annual Holiday Bazaar will be held on Saturday, Dec. 7, 2019 from 9 am – 3 pm. If you are interested in participating as a vendor, please download the application and submit the form along with payment to the church address.

Please invite your family, friends, neighbors, and co-workers to all join us at our annual Cathedral Brass Christmas Concert @ 6:00 PM Saturday, December 7th in the Sanctuary. Pot luck starts @ 4:30, concert @ 6:00, dessert to follow in Klein Hall
